Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Manchester City - Sat, Dec 21st 2024, 12:30 Aston Villa have been finalising preparations for their last match before Christmas as Manchester City visit Villa Park on Saturday. Unai Emery and his squad have going through their paces at Bodymoor Heath in readiness to face the reigning Premier League champions. Villa head into the lunchtime encounter just two points and two places behind City in the table. You can view the latest training images below…

arts.ttl: The romantic in me loves the idea of Grealish sealing stunning Villa return
arts.sum: Grealish is due to enter the final two years of his contract next summer and questions will soon start to be asked about what the future holds for the former Villa captain. A few months after joining City from Villa for £100m, Grealish said in an interview with The Telegraph that he would be open to a return to his boyhood club later in his career.
